source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit for the proposal implementation so the evaluator has the endpoint/router/SRAM composition audit generator hook.

requested_items.objective: Audit the selected Llama7B endpoint service frontier against concrete endpoint ready-valid, NoC router/FIFO PPA, and tile SRAM metrics.

expected_result.reason: The result should identify whether endpoint PPA width, router width, FIFO width, and SRAM capacity are closed or require follow-on PPA.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #815 and merge 08f728f3a3eb3467d34b00e2035dc69f1cfe8a68 at 2026-06-09T08:55:29.823829Z.
